mapper.update:
update mt_commission_cash set STATUS = 'B',OPERATOR = #{operator} where uuid = #{uuid}
AND MERCHANT_ID = #{merchantId}

update mt_commission_cash set STATUS = 'D',OPERATOR = #{operator} where uuid = #{uuid}
AND MERCHANT_ID = #{merchantId}
mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(SUM(AMOUNT), 0) FROM mt_commission_cash WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND STATUS = 'D'
